breakdown: This PR adds fallback logic to handle non-standard rewards_box keys ('xp'/'xp_gained', 'gold'/'gold_pieces') in the streaming passthrough path. The fix normalizes LLM-generated payloads before persistence. Key quality notes: test coverage is excellent (full E2E), naming is clear, but the core function lacks a docstring and type annotations for the return type. Error handling relies on coerce_int defaults rather than explicit exception handling.
key_changes: Added fallback key handling in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui for xp/xp_gained and gold/gold_pieces
Added cleanup of raw keys after normalization (pop xp and gold_pieces)
Added normalize_rewards_box_for_ui call in _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair passthrough path
